title: minuartia groenlandica subsp. glabra
intro: Minuartia groenlandica subsp. glabra, also known as Greenland pearlwort, is a flowering plant species within the genus Minuartia. It is a low-growing, mat-forming perennial found in arctic and alpine regions. The medicinal properties of Minuartia groenlandica subsp. glabra include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to support the immune system and protect against oxidative stress, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal properties.
